currencyMigrationDailyCapReached: You can run at most 2 currency migrations per day for this group; come back after {{retry_at_local_time}}.
currencyMigrationFeatureDisabled: Currency migration is disabled in this deployment. Contact your operator to enable it.
currencyMigrationPreviewExpired: The preview expired. Generating a fresh preview…
currencyMigrationRestoreInProgress: A restore operation is currently running on this group; try again after it finishes.
currencyMigrationStateChanged: The group changed since the preview was generated. Recalculating…
currencyMigrationTokenInvalid: Couldn't validate the migration request. Please retry.

global.server: Server error. Please try again later.

lockedDuringMigration: Locked while a currency migration is running.

maintenance.description: The system is temporarily unavailable while we perform scheduled maintenance. This usually takes less than 30 minutes.
maintenance.heading: We'll be right back

notFound.description: The page you requested doesn’t exist or has been moved.
notFound.heading: Page not found

unexpected.description: An unexpected error occurred. Your data is safe — this is a display issue. Try reloading the page.
unexpected.heading: Something went wrong

validation.cost_currency_iso_4217: cost_currency must be a valid ISO 4217 code
validation.cost_currency_pair_required: cost_amount and cost_currency must be set together
validation.invalid_tag_color: color must be one of: amber, green, blue, orange, red, muted
validation.invalid_tag_kind: kind must be one of: commodity, file
validation.quantity_forbids_warranty: warranty cannot be tracked on commodities with quantity greater than 1
validation.quantity_forbids_warranty_notes: warranty notes cannot be set on commodities with quantity greater than 1
validation.sale_price_required_for_sold: sale price is required when marking as sold
validation.status_date_required_on_transition: status date is required when leaving in_use
validation.status_forbids_sale_price: sale price can only be recorded when status is sold
validation.status_forbids_status_date: status date cannot be set when status is in_use
validation.validation_all_prices_zero: at least one of current price, original price, or converted original price must be set
validation.validation_converted_price_not_zero: converted original price must be zero when original price is in the group currency
validation.validation_currency_migration_same_curre: from and to currencies must differ
validation.validation_date_out_of_range: the date is out of range
validation.validation_invalid_backoffice_role: must be one of: support_agent, platform_admin
validation.validation_invalid_email: must be a valid email address
validation.validation_invalid_group_icon: icon must be one of the supported icons
validation.validation_invalid_group_role: must be one of: viewer, user, admin, owner
validation.validation_invalid_invite_role: owner cannot be assigned via invite
validation.validation_invalid_location_group_status: must be one of: active, pending_deletion
validation.validation_invalid_registration_mode: must be one of: open, approval, closed
validation.validation_invalid_restore_step_result: must be a valid restore step result
validation.validation_invalid_tenant_status: must be one of: active, suspended, inactive
validation.validation_invalid_url: must be an absolute http(s) URL
validation.validation_length_out_of_range: the length must be between {{min}} and {{max}}
validation.validation_length_too_long: the length must be no more than {{max}}
validation.validation_length_too_short: the length must be no less than {{min}}
validation.validation_match_invalid: must be in a valid format
validation.validation_no_price_in_group_currency: if original price is not in the group currency, converted original price or current price must be set
validation.validation_password_no_digit: password must contain at least one digit
validation.validation_password_no_lowercase: password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation.validation_password_no_uppercase: password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.validation_password_too_short: password must be at least 8 characters long
